title: qrafty's Underground Villages
description: This datapack adds small randomly generating underground villages at y15 to your minecraft world! 🪨
body:
# Villages underground! 🫐
The mod (or datapack) adds small bunkers / underground villages to your minecraft biomes, they can spawn everywhere where a mineshaft could also do. 

**Including:** 15 custom buildt structures generating random with each other. 

**This pack is part of my main datapack [qraftyfied!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)**

**I would be happy if you would join my [DISCORD!](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)**
